stocks.impact_theory: Biogen announced acquisition of Apellis for $5.6B at ~$41/share plus CVR. This provides immediate premium to shareholders, boosts sector M&A sentiment amid biotech rally. Economic implications: Consolidates complement inhibitors market. Market psychology: Acquisition pop typical, historical parallels to 2023 biotech deals like Seagen. Analogies: Like winning lottery ticket for holders; fuel injection for stagnant biotech engine.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Deal premium drives massive one-day surge; X sentiment highly positive on biotech M&A wave; web news confirms Biogen deal as catalyst.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +20-30% gains to deal close if no regulatory hiccups.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, arbitrage play limited upside.

stocks.justification: Clear acquisition news with verified sources and massive volume surge.

stocks.impact_theory: Eli Lilly acquiring Centessa for $38/share cash + CVR for sleep drug pipeline. Validates orexin agonist tech in narcolepsy. Implications: Big Pharma bulking up neuro portfolios. Psychology: M&A frenzy post-APLS. Parallels: Previous Lilly deals like POINT Biopharma. Analogies: Golden ticket to Big Pharma stability; biotech firework launch.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Acquisition news sparks surge; positive X chatter on Lilly's appetite; aligns with biotech sector strength.

stocks.justification: Strong acquisition confirmation from multiple sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Q3 earnings beat but guidance slashed: China -20%, tariffs crush 300bps margins, layoffs. Implications: Consumer weakness, trade war escalation. Psychology: Fear of structural damage. Parallels: 2019 tariff hits. Analogies: Punch to gut from supply chain storm; snowballing China demand freeze.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings reaction selloff despite beat; X posts highlight tariff/margin pain, downgrades; web confirms China/tariff woes.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long dip if oversold, potential rebound to $70 (+12%).

stocks.justification: Explicit earnings details and analyst downgrades.

stocks.impact_theory: Nvidia $2B investment in Marvell for silicon photonics/AI infra. Boosts optics demand. Implications: AI capex acceleration. Psychology: Nvidia halo effect. Parallels: 2023 NVDA partners surges. Analogies: Rocket booster from AI king; golden endorsement in chip wars.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Investment news amid AI hype; positive sector sentiment.

stocks.justification: Investment confirmed but less detail than acquisitions.

stocks.impact_theory: Premarket surge on de-escalation bets in Iran war, boosting energy resilience plays. Implications: Power outage fears ease but generators benefit from volatility. Psychology: Risk-on shift. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine power surges. Analogies: Safe harbor in storm; backup plan premium.
stocks.justification: Premarket move tied to macro, less company-specific.
